message:
feat: render communicate messages cleanly, hide communicate tool calls

COMMUNICATE events now display as clean assistant messages (just the
human-readable text). The communicate tool call entries are hidden
from the tool list since they're redundant noise.

Before: raw JSON tool call arguments shown as assistant text
After: "The answer to 2 + 2 is 4."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
